channel.title: Asea Brown Boveri Ltd. (ABB) — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Asea Brown Boveri Ltd. (ABB) (abb).

image.title: Asea Brown Boveri Ltd. (ABB) — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2025-14774 · 7.4 HIGH — Communication analysis between the Card Reader and TP2CardReaderService daemon
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in ABB T-MAC Plus. This issue affects T-MAC Plus: 4.0-24.

item.title: CVE-2025-14773 · 8 HIGH — Stored Cross-Site Scripting in ABB T-MAC Plus web application
item.description: Improper neutralization of input during web page generation ('cross-site scripting') vulnerability in ABB T-MAC Plus. This issue affects T-MAC Plus: 4.0-24.

item.title: CVE-2025-14772 · 8.8 HIGH — Broken Access Control in ABB T-MAC Plus web application
item.description: Authorization bypass through User-Controlled key vulnerability in ABB T-MAC Plus. This issue affects T-MAC Plus: 4.0-24.

item.title: CVE-2025-14771 · 9.9 CRITICAL — File Disclosure in ABB T-MAC Plus web application and in ABB T-MAC plus Server - Default IIS Web Site
item.description: Files or directories accessible to external parties vulnerability in ABB T-MAC Plus. This issue affects T-MAC Plus: 4.0-24.

item.title: CVE-2025-11482 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling in the OPC-UA Server
item.description: An Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling vulnerability in the OPC-UA Server used in PPT30 Operating System versions before 1.8.0 may be used by an unauthenticated network-based attacker to permanently prevent legitimate users from inte…

item.title: CVE-2025-3756 · 7.1 HIGH — Denial of Service Vulnerabilities in System 800xA, Symphony® Plus IEC 61850
item.description: A vulnerability exists in the command handling of the IEC 61850 communication stack included in the product revisions listed as affected in this CVE. An attacker with access to IEC 61850 networks could exploit the vulnera bility by using a specially…

item.title: CVE-2025-13779 · 8.3 HIGH — Configuration Data Spill
item.description: Missing authentication for critical function vulnerability in ABB AWIN GW100 rev.2, ABB AWIN GW120.This issue affects AWIN GW100 rev.2: 2.0-0, 2.0-1; AWIN GW120: 1.2-0, 1.2-1.

item.title: CVE-2025-13778 · 7.1 HIGH — Device Reboot Control
item.description: Missing authentication for critical function vulnerability in ABB AWIN GW100 rev.2, ABB AWIN GW120.This issue affects AWIN GW100 rev.2: 2.0-0, 2.0-1; AWIN GW120: 1.2-0, 1.2-1.

item.title: CVE-2025-13777 · 8.3 HIGH — Authentication Bypass due to Improper Session Validation
item.description: Authentication bypass by capture-replay vulnerability in ABB AWIN GW100 rev.2, ABB AWIN GW120.This issue affects AWIN GW100 rev.2: 2.0-0, 2.0-1; AWIN GW120: 1.2-0, 1.2-1.

item.title: CVE-2026-0936 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Insertion of Sensitive Information into Logfile
item.description: An Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File vulnerability in B&R PVI client versions prior to 6.5 may be abused by an authenticated local attacker to gather credential information which is processed by the PVI client application. The logging…

item.title: CVE-2025-11044 · 8.9 HIGH 🌩️ — Vulnerability on Automation Runtime my cause DoS Conditions
item.description: An Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling vulnerability in the ANSL-Server component of B&R Automation Runtime versions prior to 6.5 and prior to R4.93 could be exploited by an unauthenti-cated attacker on the network to win a race cond…

item.title: CVE-2025-11043 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Improper Server Certificate Validation in Automation Studio
item.description: An Improper Certificate Validation vulnerability in the OPC-UA client and ANSL over TLS client used in Automation Studio versions before 6.5 could allow an unauthenticated attacker on the network to position themselves to intercept and interfere with…

item.title: CVE-2025-14510 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — ABB Ability OPTIMAX Authentication Bypass in Single-Sign On
item.description: Incorrect Implementation of Authentication Algorithm vulnerability in ABB ABB Ability OPTIMAX.This issue affects ABB Ability OPTIMAX: 6.1, 6.2, from 6.3.0 before 6.3.1-251120, from 6.4.0 before 6.4.1-251120.

item.title: CVE-2025-4677 · 7.1 HIGH — Idle session timeout is not configured for multiple open ports
item.description: Insufficient Session Expiration vulnerability in ABB WebPro SNMP Card PowerValue, ABB WebPro SNMP Card PowerValue UL.This issue affects WebPro SNMP Card PowerValue: through 1.1.8.K; WebPro SNMP Card PowerValue UL: through 1.1.8.K.

item.title: CVE-2025-4676 · 8.8 HIGH — Authentication bypass by brute forcing Authentication Headers
item.description: Incorrect Implementation of Authentication Algorithm vulnerability in ABB WebPro SNMP Card PowerValue, ABB WebPro SNMP Card PowerValue UL.This issue affects WebPro SNMP Card PowerValue: through 1.1.8.K; WebPro SNMP Card PowerValue UL: through 1.1.8.K…

item.title: CVE-2025-4675 · 7.1 HIGH — Improper implementation of Modbus protocol leading to DOS attack
item.description: Improper Check for Unusual or Exceptional Conditions vulnerability in ABB WebPro SNMP Card PowerValue, ABB WebPro SNMP Card PowerValue UL.This issue affects WebPro SNMP Card PowerValue: through 1.1.8.K; WebPro SNMP Card PowerValue UL: through 1.1.8.K…

item.title: CVE-2025-12143 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Stack Memory Corruption Vulnerability
item.description: Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in ABB Terra AC wallbox.This issue affects Terra AC wallbox: through 1.8.33.

item.title: CVE-2025-10571 · 9.6 CRITICAL — ABB Ability Edgenius Authentication Bypass
item.description: Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel vulnerability in ABB ABB Ability Edgenius.This issue affects ABB Ability Edgenius: 3.2.0.0, 3.2.1.1.

item.title: CVE-2025-12142 · 6.9 MEDIUM — BSS(Block Started by Symbol) Memory Corruption Vulnerability
item.description: Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input ('Classic Buffer Overflow') vulnerability in ABB Terra AC wallbox.This issue affects Terra AC wallbox: through 1.8.33.

item.title: CVE-2025-5517 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Heap Memory Corruption Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in ABB Terra AC wallbox (UL40/80A), ABB Terra AC wallbox (UL32A), ABB Terra AC wallbox (MID/ CE) -Terra AC MID, ABB Terra AC wallbox (MID/ CE) -Terra AC Juno CE, ABB Terra AC wallbox (MID/ CE) -Terra AC PTB, A…

item.title: CVE-2025-3465 · 8.2 HIGH — Path Traversal Vulnerability
item.description: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal') vulnerability in ABB CoreSense™ HM, ABB CoreSense™ M10.This issue affects CoreSense™ HM: through 2.3.1; CoreSense™ M10: through 1.4.1.12.

item.title: CVE-2025-9574 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Missing Authentication Vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authentication for Critical Function vulnerability in ABB ALS-mini-s4 IP, ABB ALS-mini-s8 IP.This issue affects . All firmware versions with the Serial Number from 2000 to 5166

item.title: CVE-2025-11498 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — CSV Formula Injection Vulnerability
item.description: An Improper Neutralization of Formula Elements in a CSV File vulnerability exists in System Diagnostics Manager (SDM) of B&R Automation Runtime versions before 6.4 enabling a remote attacker to inject formula data into a generated CSV file. The explo…

item.title: CVE-2025-9970 · 7.4 HIGH — Application credential stored in clear text in memory
item.description: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information in Memory vulnerability in ABB MConfig.This issue affects MConfig: through 1.4.9.21.

item.title: CVE-2025-3449 · 4.2 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Weak Session Token used in Automation Runtime SDM
item.description: A Generation of Predictable Numbers or Identifiers vulnerability in the SDM component of B&R Automation Runtime versions before 6.4 may allow an unauthenticated network-based attacker to take over already established sessions.

item.title: CVE-2025-3448 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — XSS on SDM
item.description: Reflected cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities exist in System Diagnostics Manager (SDM) of B&R Automation Runtime versions before 6.4 that enables a remote attacker to execute arbitrary JavaScript code in the context of the attacked user’s bro…

item.title: CVE-2025-3450 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Automation Runtime SDM requests may impact system
item.description: An Improper Resource Locking vulnerability in the SDM component of B&R Automation Runtime versions before 6.3 and before Q4.93 may allow an unauthenticated network-based attacker to delete data causing denial of service conditions.

item.title: CVE-2021-22291 · 8.5 HIGH — EIBPORT Reflected XSS
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation (XSS or 'Cross-site Scripting') vulnerability in ABB EIBPORT V3 KNX, ABB EIBPORT V3 KNX GSM.This issue affects EIBPORT V3 KNX: before 3.9.2; EIBPORT V3 KNX GSM: before 3.9.2.

item.title: CVE-2025-10504 · 6.9 MEDIUM — Heap Memory Corruption Vulnerability
item.description: Heap-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in ABB Terra AC wallbox.This issue affects Terra AC wallbox: through 1.8.33.

item.title: CVE-2025-10207 · 7.5 HIGH — Authenticated File Disclosure/Delete
item.description: Improper Validation of Specified Type of Input vulnerability in ABB FLXEON.This issue affects FLXEON: through 9.3.5.

item.title: CVE-2024-48851 · 7.5 HIGH — Remote Code Execution
item.description: Improper Validation of Specified Type of Input vulnerability in ABB FLXEON.A remote code execution is possible due to an improper input validation. This issue affects FLXEON: through 9.3.5.

item.title: CVE-2025-10205 · 8.8 HIGH — Predictable Salt and Weak Hashing Algorithm
item.description: Use of a One-Way Hash with a Predictable Salt vulnerability in ABB FLXEON.This issue affects FLXEON: through 9.3.5. and newer versions

item.title: CVE-2024-48842 · 7.3 HIGH — Hardcoded passwords
item.description: Use of Hard-coded Credentials vulnerability in ABB FLXEON.This issue affects FLXEON: through 9.3.5 and newer versions

item.title: CVE-2025-8754 · 8.7 HIGH 🌩️ — ABB AbilityTM zenon Remote Transport Vulnerability
item.description: Missing Authentication for Critical Function vulnerability in ABB ABB AbilityTM zenon.This issue affects ABB AbilityTM zenon: from 7.50 through 14.

item.title: CVE-2025-7679 · 9.2 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Session ID Basic Auth Bypass
item.description: The ASPECT system allows users to bypass authentication. This issue affects all versions of ASPECT

item.title: CVE-2025-7677 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — DOS attack possible
item.description: A denial-of-service (DoS) attack is possible if access to the local network is provided to unauthorized users. This is due to a buffer copy issue that may lead to a software crash. This issue affects all versions of ASPECT.

item.title: CVE-2025-53187 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Unauthenticated RCE
item.description: Due to an issue in configuration, code that was intended for debugging purposes was included in the market release of the ASPECT FW allowing an attacker to bypass authentication. This vulnerability may allow an attacker to change the system time, acc…

item.title: CVE-2025-7745 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Modbus TCP buffer overread
item.description: Buffer Over-read vulnerability in ABB AC500 V2.This issue affects AC500 V2: through 2.5.2.

item.title: CVE-2025-7705 · 8.6 HIGH — Authentication bypass due to compatibility mode enabled by default
item.description: : Active Debug Code vulnerability in ABB Switch Actuator 4 DU-83330, ABB Switch actuator, door/light 4 DU -83330-500.This issue affects Switch Actuator 4 DU-83330: All Versions; Switch actuator, door/light 4 DU -83330-500: All Versions.

item.title: CVE-2025-6071 · 6.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Hard Coded Key used for AES encryption
item.description: Use of Hard-coded Cryptographic Key vulnerability in ABB RMC-100, ABB RMC-100 LITE. An attacker can gain access to salted information to decrypt MQTT information. This issue affects RMC-100: from 2105457-043 through 2105457-045; RMC-100 LITE: from 21…

item.title: CVE-2025-6072 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Stack Buffer Overflow in MQTTCore
item.description: Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in ABB RMC-100, ABB RMC-100 LITE. When the REST interface is enabled by the user, and an attacker gains access to the control network, and CVE-2025-6074 is exploited, the attacker can use the JSON configurati…

item.title: CVE-2025-6073 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — Stack Buffer Overflow in MQTTCore
item.description: Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability in ABB RMC-100, ABB RMC-100 LITE. When the REST interface is enabled by the user, and an attacker gains access to the control network, and user/password broker authentication is enabled, and CVE-2025-6074 is…

item.title: CVE-2025-6074 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Authentication Bypass to the MQTT configuration Web Interface
item.description: Use of Hard-coded Cryptographic Key vulnerability in ABB RMC-100, ABB RMC-100 LITE. When the REST interface is enabled by the user, and an attacker gains access to source code and control network, the attacker can bypass the REST interface authentica…

item.title: CVE-2025-4407 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Application does not invalidate session after password reset
item.description: Insufficient Session Expiration vulnerability in ABB Lite Panel Pro.This issue affects Lite Panel Pro: through 1.0.1.

item.title: CVE-2024-13967 · 9.4 CRITICAL 🌩️ — ession-Management Failure
item.description: This vulnerability allows the successful attacker to gain unauthorized access to a configuration web page delivered by the integrated web Server of EIBPORT. This issue affects EIBPORT V3 KNX: through 3.9.8; EIBPORT V3 KNX GSM: through 3.9.8.

item.title: CVE-2024-13945 · 8.4 HIGH — Stored Absolute Path Traversal
item.description: Stored Absolute Path Traversal vulnerabilities in ASPECT could expose sensitive data if administrator credentials become compromised. This issue affects ASPECT-Enterprise: through 3.*; NEXUS Series: through 3.*; MATRIX Series: through 3.*.

item.title: CVE-2024-51552 · 7.1 HIGH — Weak Password Storage
item.description: Weak password storage vulnerabilities exist in ASPECT if administrator credentials become compromisedThis issue affects ASPECT-Enterprise: through 3.*; NEXUS Series: through 3.*; MATRIX Series: through 3.*.

item.title: CVE-2024-13958 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Stored Cross Site Scripting
item.description: Stored Cross Site Scripting vulnerabilities exist in ASPECT if administrator creden-tials become compromisedThis issue affects ASPECT-Enterprise: through 3.*; NEXUS Series: through 3.*; MATRIX Series: through 3.*.

item.title: CVE-2024-13957 · 7.6 HIGH — SSRF Server Side Request Forgery
item.description: SSRF Server Side Request Forgery vulnerabilities exist in ASPECT if administrator credentials become compromisedThis issue affects ASPECT-Enterprise: through 3.*; NEXUS Series: through 3.*; MATRIX Series: through 3.*.

item.title: CVE-2024-13956 · 8.8 HIGH — SSL Verification Bypass
item.description: SSL Verification Bypass vulnerabilities exist in ASPECT if administrator credentials become compromisedThis issue affects ASPECT-Enterprise: through 3.*; NEXUS Series: through 3.*; MATRIX Series: through 3.*.
